children.text: in the case of a contract to be awarded and performed, or purchase to be made, inside the United States, $200,000; or
in the case of a contract to be awarded and performed, or purchase to be made, outside the United States, $300,000.

children.heading: Small business reserve
children.label: c Small business reserve
children.text: For a procurement carried out pursuant to subsection (a), shall be applied as if the maximum anticipated value identified therein is equal to the amounts referred to in subsection (a).section 644(j) of title 15
